title: SOX / ITGC — Cisco ISE Admin Role Change Evidence (Logical Access)
evidence: Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with SOX AS5 tagging.

compliance.assurance_rationale: PCAOB AS 5 paragraphs B27-B29 require evidence over IT general controls including logical access. UC-17.1.71 produces continuous machine-readable audit evidence of ISE admin role changes — the role that controls who can change network access policy.
compliance.controlObjective: Demonstrate to the SOX auditor that all changes to ISE admin privileges are logged, attributable, dated, and reviewable for the audit period.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search 'UC-22.12.41' archiving admin role events to `audit_evidence` with `sox_clause=AS5.B27-B29`.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Grant a new admin super-admin. Evidence captured within 5 min.

app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263) + Splunk Add-on for Cisco Identity Services (1915).
spl:
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (60050, 60051, 60052, 60100) earliest=-1d
| eval sox_clause="AS5.B27-B29", control="Logical_Access_ITGC"
| table _time, admin_user, admin_role, admin_action, source_ip, sox_clause
| collect index=audit_evidence
description: We continuously evidence SOX ITGC over ISE admin privilege lifecycle.
value: ISE admins control who can connect to financially-significant networks. SOX auditors require continuous evidence of admin privilege change with attribution; this UC produces it.
visualization: SOX ITGC dashboard: ISE admin role timeline; super-admin grant audit table.

references.title: UC-17.1.71 — Cisco ISE Admin Account Lockout, Failed-Login Burst, and Privileged-Role Audit

knownFalsePositives: 1. Bulk role updates during planned admin reorg — annotate with change ticket reference.
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.71 operational.
- `audit_evidence` with 7y retention (SOX standard).

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.12.41: SOX ITGC — ISE Admin Role Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.12.41,reg=SOX,clause=AS5.B27-B29
```

Quarterly review with SOX auditor.
grandmaExplanation: We continuously evidence SOX ITGC over ISE admin privilege lifecycle. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.
